verses.text: The altar of burnt offering of shittim wood is made, with its horns and vessels. The altar. The place of sacrifice is built.
The altar of burnt offering of shittim wood is made, with its horns and vessels. The altar. The place of sacrifice is built.
The altar of burnt offering of shittim wood is made, with its horns and vessels. The altar. The place of sacrifice is built.
Its grate, rings, and staves of brass are made; it is hollow with boards. Portable. The altar is made to be carried.
Its grate, rings, and staves of brass are made; it is hollow with boards. Portable. The altar is made to be carried.
Its grate, rings, and staves of brass are made; it is hollow with boards. Portable. The altar is made to be carried.
Its grate, rings, and staves of brass are made; it is hollow with boards. Portable. The altar is made to be carried.
The laver of brass is made from the women's looking-glasses. The laver. Even mirrors serve God's house.
The south and north sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. The holy space is enclosed.
The south and north sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. The holy space is enclosed.
The south and north sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. The holy space is enclosed.
The south and north sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. The holy space is enclosed.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure takes shape.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure takes shape.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure takes shape.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure takes shape.
The pillars, hooks, pins, and the gate of the court are made. The gate. One entrance opens to worship.
The pillars, hooks, pins, and the gate of the court are made. The gate. One entrance opens to worship.
The pillars, hooks, pins, and the gate of the court are made. The gate. One entrance opens to worship.
The pillars, hooks, pins, and the gate of the court are made. The gate. One entrance opens to worship.
The sum of the work, by Bezaleel and Aholiab, is recorded. The account. The makers are named.
The sum of the work, by Bezaleel and Aholiab, is recorded. The account. The makers are named.
The sum of the work, by Bezaleel and Aholiab, is recorded. The account. The makers are named.
The gold and silver of the offering are reckoned. The gold. Every gift is counted.
The gold and silver of the offering are reckoned. The gold. Every gift is counted.
The half-shekels of the numbered men make the sockets and hooks. The silver. The ransom money builds the sanctuary.
The half-shekels of the numbered men make the sockets and hooks. The silver. The ransom money builds the sanctuary.
The half-shekels of the numbered men make the sockets and hooks. The silver. The ransom money builds the sanctuary.
The brass is used for the sockets, the altar, and the pins. The brass. All is put to holy use.
